# uuid32(_:)

**Type Method**

Creates a new 32-bit IOBluetoothSDPUUID with the given UUID32

## Declaration

```swift
class func uuid32(_ uuid32: BluetoothSDPUUID32) -> Self!
```

## Parameters

- **uuid32**: A scalar representing a 32-bit UUID

## Return Value

Returns the new IOBluetoothSDPUUID object.
